title: Opportunity
content:
We are looking for self-motivated PhD students who are interested in AI for
heathcare, especially AI powered personalized virtual heart modelling. Both
international and European local students are welcome to apply. To check whether
you are qualified to award home-student fee in UK, please kindly check your
eligibility here.

Students with a good first degree in computer science, biomedical engineering,
applied statistics/ mathematics, or any-related field are all welcome to apply!

Application link:
https://www.jobs.ac.uk/job/DGA873/phd-studentship-ai-powered-personalized-virtua
l-heart-modelling

Biography#

Mr Guang Yang currently is a DPhil student in University of Oxford (Oxford, UK),
co-supervised by Prof Vicente Grau and Dr Lei Li. He obtained his bachelor
degree in Department of Engineering, King's College London (London, UK) in 2022.
Later, he received his master degree from Department of Electronic and
Electrical Engineering, University College London (London, UK) in 2023. His
research interest is AI for cardiac analysis, specifically focusing on medical
image analysis, multi-modal deep learning.


Research/Education Experience#

 * 10/2023-now DPhil, Institute of Biomedical Engineering, University of Oxford,
   Oxford, UK
 * 09/2022-09-2023 Master, Department of Electronic and Electrical Engineering,
   University College London, London, UK
 * 06/2022-10/2022 Research Assistant, Department of Engineering, King's College
   London, London, UK
 * 09/2019-06/2022 Bachelor, Department of Engineering, King's College London,
   London, UK


Honors & Awards#

 * 2022: King's Undergraduate Research Fellowship
 * 2022: ENMS 2022 Distinguished Graduates

Hozen Li is a dedicated web developer and a volunteer responsible for developing
and managing our organization's website. He provides technical support to the
team.

Biography#

Lei Li is a Lecturer (equals to Assistant Professor) at the School of
Electronics & Computer Science, University of Southampton. She received her PhD
degree from the School of Biomedical Engineering, Shanghai Jiao Tong University
in 2021 and bachelor's degree in Department of Medical Information Engineering,
Sichuan University, in 2016. During her PhD, she was a visiting PhD student at
Fudan University and King's College London, respectively. Her research interest
is AI for healthcare, specifically focusing on medical image analysis,
multi-modal AI, and cardiac digital twins.


Research/Education Experience#

 * 01/2024-now Lecturer, School of Electronics & Computer Science, University of
   Southampton, Southampton, UK
 * 01/2024-now Visiting Researcher, Institute of Biomedical Engineering,
   University of Oxford, Oxford, UK
 * 08/2021-12/2023 Postdoctoral Research Assistant, Institute of Biomedical
   Engineering, University of Oxford, Oxford, UK (Supervisor: Professor Vicente
   Grau)
 * 09/2016-06/2021 PhD, School of Biomedical Engineering, Shanghai Jiao Tong
   University, Shanghai, China (Supervisor:Professor Xiahai Zhuang)
 * 01/2020-03/2021 Visiting PhD, School of Biomedical Engineering & Imaging
   Sciences, King's College London, London, UK (Supervisor: Professor Julia A
   Schnabel)
 * 12/2017-12/2019 Visiting PhD, School of Data Science, Fudan University,
   Shanghai, China (Supervisor: Professor Xiahai Zhuang)
 * 09/2012-06/2016 Bachelor, Dept. Medical Information Engineering, Sichuan
   University, Chengdu, China (Supervisor: Professor Gang Yang, Professor Site
   Mo)


Honors & Awards#

 * 2024: 2nd Prize of Shanghai Science and Technology Award (Natural Science
   Award)
 * 2024: Featured Woman in Science at RSIP Vision
 * 2023: The Rising Star of Women in Engineering - Asian Deans' Forum 2023
 * 2023: IEEE TMI Distinguished Reviewer - Gold Level (2022-2023)
 * 2022: SJTU 2021 Outstanding Doctoral Graduate Development Scholarship

Miss Xicheng Sheng is currently a master's student at the School of Data
Science, Fudan University (Shanghai, China), co-supervised by Prof. Xiahai
Zhuang and Dr. Lei Li. She obtained her B.S. degree in statistics from the
School of Management, Fudan University in 2022. She is passionate about
exploring the intersection of medical data analysis and healthcare innovation.

Mr Xingtao Lin currently is a PhD student in Fuzhou University (Fuzhou, China),
co-supervised by Prof. Xiahai Zhuang, Prof Liqin Huang, Dr. Lei Li. He obtained
his master and bachelor degree in Fuzhou University (Fuzhou, China) in 2023 and
2019, seperately. His research interest is atrial fibrillation, with a primary
focus on improving the efficiency of diagnosis and treatment for this condition.
He is also concerned with how factors such as healthy eating, regular exercise,
and effective stress management impact heart health.

Mr Yilin Lyu will join in us as a PhD student in DHBE group, supervised by Dr.
Lei Li and Prof Age Chamber. He obtained his master and bachelor degree in
Dalian University of Technology (Dalian, China) in 2024 and 2021, seperately.
His research interest is machine learning and digital twin.
